releasedThisWeek.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Lil Nas X未完成的梦幻流行之作，充满大胆创意与情感张力。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Lil Nas X's unfinished dream-pop opus, brimming with bold creativity and emotional tension.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Lil Nas X的未完成专辑，融合流行与梦幻元素，展现其不拘一格的音乐视野。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: An unfinished album by Lil Nas X, blending pop and dreamy elements, showcasing his eclectic musical vision.

releasedThisWeek.title: Euphoria
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Schiller的电子交响诗篇，营造宏大的听觉宇宙。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Schiller's electronic symphonic poem, creating a vast auditory universe.
releasedThisWeek.summary: 德国电子音乐家Schiller的新专辑，以华丽编曲和深邃氛围构建沉浸式体验。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: New album by German electronic musician Schiller, offering an immersive experience with lush arrangements and deep atmospheres.

releasedThisWeek.title: Electric Fantasy
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Pierre Schott的电子幻想曲，法式浪漫与科技感的碰撞。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Pierre Schott's electronic fantasy, a collision of French romance and techno feel.
releasedThisWeek.summary: 法国制作人Pierre Schott的专辑，融合梦幻旋律与电子节拍，充满浪漫气息。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Album by French producer Pierre Schott, blending dreamy melodies with electronic beats, full of romance.

releasedThisWeek.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Don McLean 1975年曼彻斯特现场，经典民谣的珍贵录音。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Don McLean's 1975 Manchester live recording, a precious piece of classic folk.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Don McLean 1975年曼彻斯特现场专辑，收录《American Pie》等经典曲目，温暖怀旧。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Live album from Don McLean's 1975 Manchester concert, featuring classics like 'American Pie', warm and nostalgic.

releasedThisWeek.title: Eingenordet
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Versengold的德国中世纪民谣金属，狂欢与史诗并存。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Versengold's German medieval folk metal, where revelry meets epicness.
releasedThisWeek.summary: 德国乐队Versengold的新专辑，融合中世纪民谣与重金属，节奏强劲，氛围热烈。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: New album by German band Versengold, blending medieval folk with heavy metal, energetic and intense.

releasedThisWeek.title: The Power Station
releasedThisWeek.highlight: The Power Station同名专辑再版，80年代AOR经典重现。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Reissue of The Power Station's self-titled album, a classic 80s AOR revival.
releasedThisWeek.summary: 超级乐团The Power Station同名专辑，融合放克、摇滚与流行，是80年代标志性声音。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Supergroup The Power Station's self-titled album, blending funk, rock, and pop, an iconic 80s sound.

releasedThisWeek.title: Galaxia Tropical
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical的拉丁热带风情，舞动你的灵魂。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical's Latin tropical vibes to make your soul dance.
releasedThisWeek.summary: 秘鲁乐队Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical的专辑，充满活力的热带节奏与拉丁风情。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Album by Peruvian band Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical, full of vibrant tropical rhythms and Latin flair.

releasedThisWeek.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Robin Trower美国现场，布鲁斯摇滚的即兴盛宴。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Robin Trower's US live album, a blues-rock improvisation feast.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Robin Trower的现场专辑，展现其精湛吉他技艺与布鲁斯摇滚的深厚功底。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Live album by Robin Trower, showcasing his masterful guitar skills and deep blues-rock roots.

releasedThisWeek.title: Metal - The Exclusive EP
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Heavysaurus的儿童金属EP，恐龙与重金属的奇妙组合。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Heavysaurus's kids metal EP, a fantastic combo of dinosaurs and heavy metal.
releasedThisWeek.summary: 芬兰乐队Heavysaurus的EP，以恐龙为主题，用重金属为孩子们带来欢乐。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: EP by Finnish band Heavysaurus, dinosaur-themed, bringing joy to kids with heavy metal.

releasedThisWeek.title: Warehouse 2026: 7.16.2025 Allianz Amphitheater At Riverfront, Richmond, VA
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Dave Matthews Band现场专辑，捕捉2025年夏夜的音乐魔力。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Dave Matthews Band live album, capturing the musical magic of a summer night in 2025.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Dave Matthews Band 2025年现场录音，充满即兴与互动，体现乐队现场魅力。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Live recording from Dave Matthews Band in 2025, full of improvisation and interaction, showcasing their live appeal.

releasedThisWeek.title: Pause for a moment
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Dela Hüttner’s SwingThing的爵士摇摆，优雅复古的听觉享受。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Dela Hüttner’s SwingThing's jazz swing, an elegant retro auditory pleasure.
releasedThisWeek.summary: 瑞士爵士乐队Dela Hüttner’s SwingThing的专辑，充满复古摇摆与优雅旋律。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Album by Swiss jazz band Dela Hüttner’s SwingThing, full of retro swing and elegant melodies.

upcoming.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
upcoming.highlight: 未完成的梦幻流行，Lil Nas X的私密日记
upcoming.highlightEn: Unfinished dream-pop, Lil Nas X's intimate diary
upcoming.summary: Lil Nas X的未完成专辑，融合梦幻流行与实验元素，展现其私密情感与艺术探索。
upcoming.summaryEn: Lil Nas X's unfinished album blends dream-pop with experimental elements, revealing intimate emotions and artistic exploration.

upcoming.title: Euphoria
upcoming.highlight: 德国电子音乐大师的迷幻氛围之旅
upcoming.highlightEn: German electronic maestro's psychedelic ambient journey
upcoming.summary: Schiller的新专辑延续其标志性的氛围电子风格，营造迷幻而深邃的听觉空间。
upcoming.summaryEn: Schiller's new album continues his signature ambient electronic style, creating a psychedelic and profound soundscape.

upcoming.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
upcoming.highlight: Don McLean 1975年曼彻斯特现场，经典民谣的永恒瞬间
upcoming.highlightEn: Don McLean's 1975 Manchester live, timeless folk moments
upcoming.summary: Don McLean的1975年曼彻斯特现场录音，收录其经典曲目，展现民谣大师的舞台魅力。
upcoming.summaryEn: Live recording of Don McLean in Manchester 1975, featuring his classic songs and showcasing the folk master's stage charisma.

upcoming.title: Together Again
upcoming.highlight: 两位民谣老将的温暖合作，友谊与音乐的交织
upcoming.highlightEn: Warm collaboration between two folk veterans, interweaving friendship and music
upcoming.summary: John McCutcheon与Tom Paxton的合作专辑，充满温暖的民谣旋律与真挚的情感交流。
upcoming.summaryEn: Collaboration album between John McCutcheon and Tom Paxton, filled with warm folk melodies and sincere emotional exchange.

upcoming.title: Eingenordet
upcoming.highlight: 德国中世纪民谣金属的北欧神话篇章
upcoming.highlightEn: German medieval folk metal's Norse mythology chapter
upcoming.summary: Versengold新专辑以北欧神话为主题，融合中世纪民谣与重金属，营造史诗般的听觉体验。
upcoming.summaryEn: Versengold's new album themed on Norse mythology, blending medieval folk with heavy metal for an epic auditory experience.

upcoming.title: Utan Ok Innan
upcoming.highlight: 神秘黑金属单曲，冰冷氛围中的暴烈嘶吼
upcoming.highlightEn: Mysterious black metal single, violent screams in icy atmosphere
upcoming.summary: Vígundr的单曲营造冰冷而暴烈的黑金属氛围，适合极端金属爱好者。
upcoming.summaryEn: Vígundr's single creates an icy and violent black metal atmosphere, suitable for extreme metal fans.

upcoming.title: Galaxia Tropical
upcoming.highlight: 秘鲁热带坎比亚的复古律动，南美阳光之音
upcoming.highlightEn: Peruvian tropical cumbia's retro groove, South American sunny sound
upcoming.summary: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical带来纯正的秘鲁热带坎比亚，充满复古律动与阳光气息。
upcoming.summaryEn: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical delivers authentic Peruvian tropical cumbia, full of retro groove and sunny vibes.

upcoming.title: The Power Station
upcoming.highlight: 80年代超级乐队同名专辑，放克摇滚的黄金时代
upcoming.highlightEn: 80s supergroup's self-titled album, golden age of funk rock
upcoming.summary: The Power Station的同名专辑是80年代放克摇滚的经典之作，集结多位音乐天才，充满能量与律动。
upcoming.summaryEn: The Power Station's self-titled album is a classic of 80s funk rock, featuring multiple musical talents, full of energy and groove.

upcoming.title: Romance De La Venganza
upcoming.highlight: 拉丁复仇浪漫，传统与现代的激情碰撞
upcoming.highlightEn: Latin revenge romance, passionate clash of tradition and modernity
upcoming.summary: Krystal Martínez-Rodríguez的专辑融合拉丁传统与现代元素，讲述复仇与浪漫的故事，戏剧性十足。
upcoming.summaryEn: Krystal Martínez-Rodríguez's album blends Latin tradition and modernity, telling a story of revenge and romance with full drama.

upcoming.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
upcoming.highlight: Robin Trower的现场吉他盛宴，布鲁斯摇滚的即兴火花
upcoming.highlightEn: Robin Trower's live guitar feast, blues rock improvisation sparks
upcoming.summary: Robin Trower的美国现场专辑展现其精湛的吉他技艺与布鲁斯摇滚的即兴魅力，乐迷必收。
upcoming.summaryEn: Robin Trower's live album in the USA showcases his masterful guitar skills and the improvisational charm of blues rock, a must-have for fans.

upcoming.title: could never forget
upcoming.highlight: kkaydes的梦幻电子，迷离氛围中的情感漂流
upcoming.highlightEn: kkaydes' dreamy electronic, emotional drift in hazy atmosphere
upcoming.summary: kkaydes的专辑营造迷离梦幻的电子氛围，适合深夜聆听，感受情感的细腻漂流。
upcoming.summaryEn: kkaydes' album creates a hazy dreamy electronic atmosphere, perfect for late-night listening, experiencing delicate emotional drift.
